memoryArtifacts.headline: SIR GILBERT ECCLES: "ECCLES OF SHANNOCK"

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Eccles於1573年7月19日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親John Eccles 7th Laird of Kildonan33歲，母親Margaret40歲。他於1597年與Janet Cathcart在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1638年4月9日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉可米可艾爾享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Eccles于1573年7月19日出生在苏格兰艾斯爾时，他的父亲John Eccles 7th Laird of Kildonan33岁，母亲Margaret40岁。他于1597年与Janet Cathcart在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1638年4月9日在苏格兰艾斯爾吉可米可艾爾享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eccles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Eccles in Lancashire, or possibly from any of several other places so named in Kent, Norfolk, Berwickshire, and Dumfriesshire, from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’). Such places would have been the sites of notable pre-Anglo-Saxon churches or Christian places of communal worship.

variants.name: Exley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from Exley in Southowram (Yorkshire), from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Eccles .
Americanized form of South German   Oechsle  .

variants.name: Echols
meanings: Altered form of English   Eccles   and possibly also of German   Eckels  .

variants.name: Eckles
meanings: English: variant of   Eccles  . This form is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Eccles was born on 19 July 1573, in Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, John Eccles 7th Laird of Kildonan, was 33 and his mother, Margaret, was 40. He married Janet Cathcart in 1597, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 9 April 1638, in Kirkmichael, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Eccles est né le 19 juillet 1573, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, John Eccles 7th Laird of Kildonan, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Janet Cathcart en 1597, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1638, à Kirkmichael, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Eccles am 19. Juli 1573 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Eccles 7th Laird of Kildonan 33 und seine Mutter Margaret 40. Er hat 1597 in Scotland Janet Cathcart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 9. April 1638 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Kirkmichael, Ayrshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Eccles è nato il il 19 luglio 1573 nel Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John Eccles 7th Laird of Kildonan, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Janet Cathcart nel 1597, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 9 aprile 1638, nel Kirkmichael, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Ecclesが1573年7月19日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Eccles 7th Laird of Kildonanは33歳，母Margaretは40歳であった。1597年にスコットランドでJanet Cathcartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1638年4月9日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルクミチャエルで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Eccles(이)가 1573년 7월 19일 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Eccles 7th Laird of Kildonan(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1597년 스컷랜드에서 Janet Cathcart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1638년 4월 9일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 커크믹하얼에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Eccles родился 19 июля 1573 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Eccles 7th Laird of Kildonan было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Cathcart в 1597 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 9 апреля 1638 г. в местности киркмачаел, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 64 лет.
